targets.rawSql:
;WITH ng_lot_ids AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM([Judgement [S]]]))) = 'X'
      AND [Identical ID] IS NOT NULL
      AND (
          '${spc_mold:csv}' = 'All'
          OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) + ',',
                       ',' + '${spc_mold:csv}' + ',') > 0
      )
      AND (
          '${spc_mc_no:csv}' = 'All'
          OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) + ',',
                       ',' + '${spc_mc_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
      )
      AND (
          '${spc_part_no:csv}' = 'All'
          OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) + ',',
                       ',' + '${spc_part_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
      )
      AND (
          '${spc_year:csv}' = 'All'
          OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) + ',',
                       ',' + '${spc_year:csv}' + ',') > 0
      )
),
main_data AS (
    SELECT
        -- ✅ Step 1: ใช้ TRY_CONVERT โดยตรง ไม่แปลง DD-MM-YY
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS time,
        TRY_CAST(m.[XBar] AS FLOAT)              AS xbar_val,
        TRY_CAST(m.[R]    AS FLOAT)              AS r_val,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Upper Limit])) AS FLOAT) AS ul_val,
        TRY_CAST(
            CASE
                WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(RTRIM([STD Value]))) > 0
                THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM([STD Value])),
                          CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(RTRIM([STD Value]))) - 1)
                ELSE LTRIM(RTRIM([STD Value]))
            END
        AS FLOAT)                                AS std_val,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Lower Limit])) AS FLOAT) AS ll_val
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database] AS m
    WHERE
        [Identical ID] IN (SELECT [Identical ID] FROM ng_lot_ids)
        -- ✅ Step 1: ลบ LEN(...) = 8 ออก
        AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        -- ✅ Step 1: ใช้ TRY_CAST แทน IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(m.[XBar] AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(m.[R]    AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND (
            '${spc_year:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_year:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_mold:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_mold:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_mc_no:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_mc_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_part_no:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_part_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND CHARINDEX(
                ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC])) + ',',
                ISNULL(
                    NULLIF(',' + '${spc_isc:csv}' + ',', ',All,'),
                    ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC])) + ','
                )
            ) > 0
        AND CHARINDEX(
                ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Cavity No.])) + ',',
                ISNULL(
                    NULLIF(',' + '${spc_cavity:csv}' + ',', ',All,'),
                    ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Cavity No.])) + ','
                )
            ) > 0
)
SELECT * FROM main_data

UNION ALL

-- ✅ Step 2: anchor ต้นปี → ใช้ MIN date จริงแทน spc_year string
SELECT
    CAST(DATEADD(YEAR, DATEDIFF(YEAR, 0, MIN(time)), 0) AS DATE),
    NULL, NULL,
    MAX(ul_val), MAX(std_val), MAX(ll_val)
FROM main_data
WHERE ul_val IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

-- ✅ Step 2: anchor ปลายปี → ใช้ MAX date จริงแทน spc_year string
SELECT
    CAST(DATEADD(YEAR, DATEDIFF(YEAR, 0, MAX(time)) + 1, -1) AS DATE),
    NULL, NULL,
    MAX(ul_val), MAX(std_val), MAX(ll_val)
FROM main_data
WHERE ul_val IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY time

;WITH ng_lot_ids AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM([Judgement [S]]]))) = 'X'
      AND [Identical ID] IS NOT NULL
      AND (
          '${spc_mold:csv}' = 'All'
          OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) + ',',
                       ',' + '${spc_mold:csv}' + ',') > 0
      )
      AND (
          '${spc_mc_no:csv}' = 'All'
          OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) + ',',
                       ',' + '${spc_mc_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
      )
      AND (
          '${spc_part_no:csv}' = 'All'
          OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) + ',',
                       ',' + '${spc_part_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
      )
      AND (
          '${spc_year:csv}' = 'All'
          OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) + ',',
                       ',' + '${spc_year:csv}' + ',') > 0
      )
),
ng_time_lookup AS (
    SELECT
        [Identical ID],
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS prod_date,
        MAX(TRY_CONVERT(TIME, [Production Time])) AS ng_time
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM([Judgement [S]]]))) = 'X'
      AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
      AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        [Identical ID],
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]])
),
unique_records AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [Part Type],
        [Identical ID],
        [QC Member],
        [Year Record],
        [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],
        [Sequence],
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))       AS part_name,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))    AS material_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))          AS oi_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])) AS sample_part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))    AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))   AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))       AS qc_member_val
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Identical ID] IN (SELECT [Identical ID] FROM ng_lot_ids)
        AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        AND (
            '${spc_year:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_year:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_mold:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_mold:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_mc_no:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_mc_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_part_no:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_part_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND CHARINDEX(
                ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC])) + ',',
                ISNULL(NULLIF(',' + '${spc_isc:csv}' + ',', ',All,'),
                       ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC])) + ',')
            ) > 0
        AND CHARINDEX(
                ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Cavity No.])) + ',',
                ISNULL(NULLIF(',' + '${spc_cavity:csv}' + ',', ',All,'),
                       ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM([Cavity No.])) + ',')
            ) > 0
),
d_part    AS (SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID], part_name      FROM unique_records),
d_mat     AS (SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID], material_no    FROM unique_records),
d_oi      AS (SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID], oi_no          FROM unique_records),
d_sample  AS (SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID], sample_part_no FROM unique_records),
d_lot     AS (SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID], lot_material   FROM unique_records),
d_cond    AS (SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID], condition_std  FROM unique_records),
d_qc      AS (SELECT DISTINCT [Identical ID], qc_member_val  FROM unique_records),
agg_part   AS (SELECT [Identical ID], STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ') AS part_name_agg      FROM d_part   GROUP BY [Identical ID]),
agg_mat    AS (SELECT [Identical ID], STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ') AS material_no_agg    FROM d_mat    GROUP BY [Identical ID]),
agg_oi     AS (SELECT [Identical ID], STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ') AS oi_no_agg          FROM d_oi     GROUP BY [Identical ID]),
agg_sample AS (SELECT [Identical ID], STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ') AS sample_part_no_agg FROM d_sample GROUP BY [Identical ID]),
agg_lot    AS (SELECT [Identical ID], STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ') AS lot_material_agg   FROM d_lot    GROUP BY [Identical ID]),
agg_cond   AS (SELECT [Identical ID], STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ') AS condition_std_agg  FROM d_cond   GROUP BY [Identical ID]),
agg_qc     AS (SELECT [Identical ID], STRING_AGG(qc_member_val,  ' / ') AS qc_member_agg      FROM d_qc     GROUP BY [Identical ID]),
main_data AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN ng.ng_time IS NOT NULL
            THEN CAST(
                    CAST(TRY_CONVERT(DATE, m.[Production Date [S]]]) AS DATETIME)
                    + CAST(ng.ng_time AS DATETIME)
                 AS DATETIME)
            ELSE CAST(TRY_CONVERT(DATE, m.[Production Date [S]]]) AS DATETIME)
        END                                               AS time,
        m.[Identical ID],
        -- ✅ รองรับ XBar/R เป็น FLOAT โดยตรง หรือ VARCHAR
        CASE
            WHEN TRY_CAST(m.[XBar] AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
            THEN TRY_CAST(m.[XBar] AS FLOAT)
            ELSE NULL
        END                                               AS xbar_val,
        CASE
            WHEN TRY_CAST(m.[R] AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
            THEN TRY_CAST(m.[R] AS FLOAT)
            ELSE NULL
        END                                               AS r_val,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Upper Limit])) AS FLOAT) AS ul_val,
        TRY_CAST(
            CASE
                WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[STD Value]))) > 0
                THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[STD Value])),
                          CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[STD Value]))) - 1)
                ELSE LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[STD Value]))
            END
        AS FLOAT)                                         AS std_val,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Lower Limit])) AS FLOAT) AS ll_val
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database] AS m
    LEFT JOIN ng_time_lookup AS ng
        ON  m.[Identical ID] = ng.[Identical ID]
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, m.[Production Date [S]]]) = ng.prod_date
    WHERE
        m.[Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, m.[Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        -- ✅ ลบ IS NOT NULL ออก → ใช้ TRY_CAST แทน
        AND (TRY_CAST(m.[XBar] AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
             OR TRY_CAST(m.[R]   AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL)
        AND (
            '${spc_year:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Year Record])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_year:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_mold:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Mold No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_mold:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_mc_no:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[M/C No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_mc_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND (
            '${spc_part_no:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CHARINDEX(',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Part No.])) + ',',
                         ',' + '${spc_part_no:csv}' + ',') > 0
        )
        AND CHARINDEX(
                ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[ISC])) + ',',
                ISNULL(NULLIF(',' + '${spc_isc:csv}' + ',', ',All,'),
                       ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[ISC])) + ',')
            ) > 0
        AND CHARINDEX(
                ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Cavity No.])) + ',',
                ISNULL(NULLIF(',' + '${spc_cavity:csv}' + ',', ',All,'),
                       ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(m.[Cavity No.])) + ',')
            ) > 0
),
main_with_breakdown AS (
    SELECT
        m.time,
        m.xbar_val,
        m.r_val,
        m.ul_val,
        m.std_val,
        m.ll_val,
        ap.part_name_agg       AS [Part Name],
        am.material_no_agg     AS [Material No],
        ao.oi_no_agg           AS [OI No.],
        asa.sample_part_no_agg AS [Sample Part No.],
        al.lot_material_agg    AS [Lot Material],
        ac.condition_std_agg   AS [Condition STD],
        aq.qc_member_agg       AS [QC Member]
    FROM main_data             m
    LEFT JOIN agg_part   ap  ON ap.[Identical ID]  = m.[Identical ID]
    LEFT JOIN agg_mat    am  ON am.[Identical ID]  = m.[Identical ID]
    LEFT JOIN agg_oi     ao  ON ao.[Identical ID]  = m.[Identical ID]
    LEFT JOIN agg_sample asa ON asa.[Identical ID] = m.[Identical ID]
    LEFT JOIN agg_lot    al  ON al.[Identical ID]  = m.[Identical ID]
    LEFT JOIN agg_cond   ac  ON ac.[Identical ID]  = m.[Identical ID]
    LEFT JOIN agg_qc     aq  ON aq.[Identical ID]  = m.[Identical ID]
)
SELECT * FROM main_with_breakdown

UNION ALL

SELECT
    CAST(DATEADD(YEAR, DATEDIFF(YEAR, 0, MIN(time)), 0) AS DATETIME),
    NULL, NULL,
    MAX(ul_val), MAX(std_val), MAX(ll_val),
    NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
FROM main_data
WHERE ul_val IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT
    CAST(DATEADD(YEAR, DATEDIFF(YEAR, 0, MAX(time)) + 1, -1) AS DATETIME),
    NULL, NULL,
    MAX(ul_val), MAX(std_val), MAX(ll_val),
    NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
FROM main_data
WHERE ul_val IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY time

list.definition:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                    -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
list.label: Month
list.name: spc_month
list.query:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                    -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM([Year Record]) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY value DESC
list.label: Year
list.name: spc_year
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM([Year Record]) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY value DESC

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) NOT LIKE '0%'
  AND LEN(TRIM([Mold No.])) > 1
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'    -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Mold No.
list.name: spc_mold
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) NOT LIKE '0%'
  AND LEN(TRIM([Mold No.])) > 1
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'    -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    [M/C No.] AS __text,
    [M/C No.] AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([M/C No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${spc_mold:singlequote})               -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: M/C No.
list.name: spc_mc_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    [M/C No.] AS __text,
    [M/C No.] AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([M/C No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${spc_mold:singlequote})               -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${spc_mold:singlequote})               -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND [M/C No.]        IN (${spc_mc_no:singlequote})              -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Part No.
list.name: spc_part_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${spc_mold:singlequote})               -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND [M/C No.]        IN (${spc_mc_no:singlequote})              -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([ISC]) AS __text,
    TRIM([ISC]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [ISC] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([ISC]) <> ''
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${spc_mold:singlequote})
  AND [M/C No.]        IN (${spc_mc_no:singlequote})
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) IN (${spc_part_no:singlequote})
ORDER BY __value
list.label: ISC
list.name: spc_isc
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([ISC]) AS __text,
    TRIM([ISC]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [ISC] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([ISC]) <> ''
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${spc_mold:singlequote})
  AND [M/C No.]        IN (${spc_mc_no:singlequote})
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) IN (${spc_part_no:singlequote})
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Cavity No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Cavity No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Cavity No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Cavity No.]) <> ''
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${spc_mold:singlequote})
  AND [M/C No.]        IN (${spc_mc_no:singlequote})
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) IN (${spc_part_no:singlequote})
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Cavity No.
list.name: spc_cavity
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Cavity No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Cavity No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Cavity No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Cavity No.]) <> ''
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${spc_mold:singlequote})
  AND [M/C No.]        IN (${spc_mc_no:singlequote})
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) IN (${spc_part_no:singlequote})
ORDER BY __value

title: X̄ CONTROL CHART  PER SEQUENCE/DATE (X̄ CHART)
